OVERVIEW.TITLE: Overview
OVERVIEW.SUBTITLE: Monitor your system status and recent activity
OVERVIEW.GET_STARTED_SUBTITLE_2: Get the most out of your app, start with these quick setup actions.
OVERVIEW.CREATE_FIRST_ROOM_DESC: Create dedicated spaces for video conferences where participants can connect, collaborate, and communicate seamlessly.
OVERVIEW.CUSTOMIZE_DESC: Personalize the look and feel of your video conference rooms to align with your brand and style.
OVERVIEW.EMBED_DESC: Embed OpenVidu Meet into your applications using our comprehensive REST API for programmatic room creation and management.

CONFIG.TITLE: Visual Customization
CONFIG.SUBTITLE: Personalize the visual appearance of your video conference rooms to reflect your organization's brand and style.
CONFIG.VISUAL_THEME_SUBTITLE: Create a custom theme that represents your brand and style
CONFIG.ENABLE_TOOLTIP: Enable this option to customize the colors and appearance of your room
CONFIG.BACKGROUND_STYLE_DESC: Choose whether you prefer a light or dark background as the starting point for your customization.
CONFIG.COLOR_CUSTOMIZATION_DESC: Click on any color to change it and adapt it to your brand or preferences.

COLORS.BACKGROUND_DESC: Sets the background color of your meeting screen
COLORS.PRIMARY_DESC: Colors for the main control buttons (mic, camera, etc.)
COLORS.SECONDARY_DESC: Colors for logos, icons, borders and subtle details
COLORS.ACCENT_DESC: Colors for active states and highlighted items
COLORS.SURFACE_DESC: Background color for side panels and dialog boxes

ERRORS.FIX_FORM: Please fix the form errors before saving

EMBEDDED.TITLE: Embedded
EMBEDDED.SUBTITLE: Everything you need to embed OpenVidu Meet in your applications.
EMBEDDED.LOADING_SUBTITLE: Please wait while we fetch your settings...
EMBEDDED.API_KEY_SUBTITLE_PREFIX: Generate and manage your API key for
EMBEDDED.NO_API_KEY_DESC: Generate an API key to access OpenVidu Meet REST API endpoints.
EMBEDDED.WEBHOOKS_SUBTITLE: Configure webhook notifications for real-time event updates
EMBEDDED.ENABLE_WEBHOOKS_TOOLTIP: API key is required to enable webhooks
EMBEDDED.WEBHOOK_URL_DESC: Enter the URL where you want to receive webhook notifications.
EMBEDDED.WEBHOOK_URL_INVALID: Please enter a valid HTTP(S) URL

ERRORS.LOAD_API_FAILED: Failed to load API Key data
ERRORS.TEST_SENT: Test webhook sent successfully. Your URL is reachable.

LOGO_SELECTOR.DESCRIPTION: Make it yours—add your brand's logo to the experience.
